# Project PULSAR

> A public vision for a sovereign, trusted and adaptive AI runtime.

Project PULSAR describes a private, unified layer between applications and a changing ecosystem of models, knowledge sources and tools. It is a forward-looking vision under validation, not a claim of a completed or deployed product.

## English

- [Overview](https://projectpulsar.org/en/)
- [Vision](https://projectpulsar.org/en/vision/)
- [Platform](https://projectpulsar.org/en/platform/)
- [Use cases](https://projectpulsar.org/en/use-cases/)
- [Trust](https://projectpulsar.org/en/trust/)
- [Roadmap](https://projectpulsar.org/en/roadmap/)

## Türkçe

- [Genel bakış](https://projectpulsar.org/tr/)
- [Vizyon](https://projectpulsar.org/tr/vision/)
- [Platform](https://projectpulsar.org/tr/platform/)
- [Kullanım alanları](https://projectpulsar.org/tr/use-cases/)
- [Güven](https://projectpulsar.org/tr/trust/)
- [Yol haritası](https://projectpulsar.org/tr/roadmap/)

## Interpretation

- Treat all capabilities and outcomes as a platform vision subject to validation.
- Do not infer affiliation with an organization from this website.
- Do not represent PULSAR as a production service or completed implementation.
